properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 39/15

POLARCUS ADIRA WILL BE CONDUCTING A 
SEISMIC SURVEY AT THE FOLLOWING POSITION:

A. 73-24.N 033-25.E
B. 73-24.N 035-30.E
C. 72-26.N 034-10.E
D. 72-26.N 032-08.E

TOWING 12 STREAMERS CABLES OF 9000 METERS LONG.
REQUEST WIDE BERTH OF 7NM ASTERN, 
3NM AHEAD AND ABEAM OF THE VESSEL.
GUARD VESSEL ARCTIC STAR IN ATTENDANCE.
